name: open-notebook
tagline: Wraps the self-hosted Open Notebook REST API for organizing research, ingesting docs, AI chat/search, and podcast generation across 16+ prov
verdict: Mostly a documentation wrapper around a legitimate open-source self-hosted tool (github.com/lfnovo/open-notebook); no secret exfiltration or hidden instructions found. Main risk: the install step curls docker-compose.yml from the 'main' branch unpinned and unverified, then runs docker-compose up -d, so a future repo compromise or unreviewed change would be p

highlights.summary: Line 39: `curl -o docker-compose.yml https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lfnovo/open-notebook/main/docker-compose.yml` pulls from the unpinned `main` branch and is executed via docker-compose without an

Install pulls docker-compose.yml from an unpinned branch (line 39) and the compose file's own image sources aren't shown/pinned in this document, leaving supply-chain trust entirely on the upstream re
No 'do not use when' guidance is given anywhere in the file — e.g. no note that this requires Docker/self-hosting and isn't for users wanting a zero-install cloud option.
